subcodes.first_line: O Teacher in the School of Divine Knowledge! The Illuminati declare that until now but two souls have been designated by the title of Teacher [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معلم دبستان عرفان حکمای اشراق گویند بلقب معلمی تا بحال دو شخص موسوم یکی
subcodes.subjects: @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause
